title: Home
scope: Home management hub — recurring and ad-hoc maintenance tasks, home issues (problems/repairs), and the maintenance log, organized by category. Tracks the upkeep of the house itself. NOT vehicle upkeep (the Auto app) or medical-equipment upkeep (the Medical app).

specs.title: Create a task
specs.behavior: Creating records a home maintenance task, recurring or ad-hoc.

specs.title: Get a task
specs.behavior: Getting returns a task's details and completion history.

specs.title: Complete a task
specs.behavior: Completing marks a home maintenance task done and records the completion.

specs.title: Update a task
specs.behavior: Updating changes an existing home maintenance task.

specs.title: Delete a task
specs.behavior: Deleting permanently removes a task and its completion history.

specs.title: Overdue tasks
specs.behavior: Overdue returns all home tasks that are overdue or due soon.

specs.title: Report an issue
specs.behavior: Reporting records a home issue — something needing attention, repair, or monitoring.

specs.title: List issues
specs.behavior: Listing returns home issues (problems, repairs, things to fix).

specs.title: Get an issue
specs.behavior: Getting returns the full details of a home issue.

specs.title: Update an issue
specs.behavior: Updating changes only the supplied fields of a home issue.

specs.title: Delete an issue
specs.behavior: Deleting permanently removes a home issue.

specs.title: Recent maintenance log
specs.behavior: The recent log returns the latest maintenance completions across all tasks.

specs.title: Delete a log entry
specs.behavior: Deleting removes a specific maintenance completion record.

specs.title: List categories
specs.behavior: Listing returns all home maintenance task categories.

specs.title: Create a category
specs.behavior: Creating adds a new home maintenance task category.

specs.title: Update a category
specs.behavior: Updating changes a home maintenance task category.

specs.title: Delete a category
specs.behavior: Deleting removes a home maintenance task category.
